Take 8 steps: Now we take 8 more steps north, making the total of 17 steps north from the starting point. 4. Turn right: This would mean turning from facing north to facing east. At this point, we are 17 steps north of the starting point and facing east. We haven't returned to the starting point, and the instructions stop at this point.
